PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?coach ?coachLabel ?team ?teamLabel ?birth ?start WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P118 wd:Q1215884 .
  ?team p:P286 ?coachStatement .
  ?coachStatement ps:P286 ?coach ; pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?coachStatement pq:P582 ?endDate
  }
  ?coach wdt:P569 ?birth .
  BIND(YEAR(?start) - YEAR(?birth) AS ?age)
  FILTER(?age >= 40)
  FILTER(?age < 50)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?coach rdfs:label ?coachLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?coachLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
}
LIMIT 100

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT ?coach ?coachLabel ?team ?teamLabel ?birth ?start
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P118 wd:Q1215884 .
  ?team p:P286 ?coachStatement .
  ?coachStatement ps:P286 ?coach ;
                  pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?coachStatement pq:P582 ?endDate }
  ?coach wdt:P569 ?birth .
  BIND(YEAR(?start) - YEAR(?birth) AS ?age)
  FILTER (?age >= 40)
  FILTER (?age < 50)
  OPTIONAL { ?coach rdfs:label ?coachLabel . FILTER (lang(?coachLabel) = "en") }
  OPTIONAL { ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel . FILTER (lang(?teamLabel) = "en") }
}
LIMIT 100
